triage_rows.detail: The next justified work is local attribution/failure review inside the isolated sell-side lane, not replay binding or reentry execution.
Keep the branch sell-side only and holdings-aware only; do not reopen wider all-session expansion or full replay binding.

interpretation: V1.34CG converts the first horizon audit on the isolated sell-side binding surface into a direction judgment.
The lane remains worth retaining, but now with an explicit horizon caveat and a narrower next step inside local binding attribution rather than replay expansion.
